reason: Both Metformin and Ashwagandha can lower blood sugar levels. Taking them together may increase the risk of hypoglycemia (low blood sugar).
recommendation: Monitor blood sugar closely. Adjust dosages under medical supervision.

reason: Amlodipine (calcium channel blocker) and Sarpagandha (contains reserpine) both significantly lower blood pressure. Co-administration can cause dangerous severe hypotension.
recommendation: Avoid combining these without strict oversight from an integrative physician.

reason: Ibuprofen acts as an NSAID and Ginseng can have mild antiplatelet effects. Using them together might mildly increase bleeding risk.
recommendation: Use cautiously if you have bleeding disorders.
